description: List of names and books that mentions Rabbi Yiṣḥaq Berab (החכם יצחק בירב), Avraham Ashkenazi, Avraham b. Alashqar. The paleography of this source helps to estimate its dating as 16th/17th-century but it may be calculated more directly by tracing the lifetimes of the individuals mentioned. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
